description: This file defines authentication-related dependencies and functions for FastAPI, including user retrieval from a token, token validation, and admin privilege enforcement.

classes.name: AppUser
classes.description: Database model representing an application user.

methods.name: AppUser get_current_user( request: Request, creds: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials | None = Depends(bearer_scheme), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Retrieves the current user based on the Bearer token from the request, validating the token and user status.

methods.name: AppUser require_admin(user: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user))
methods.description: Checks if the current user has admin privileges, raising an exception if not.

ctags.name: get_current_user
ctags.signature: ( request: Request, creds: HTTPAuthorizationCredentials | None = Depends(bearer_scheme), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
